name: ElevenLabs MCP Server
what_it_does: ElevenLabs MCP server enabling AI agents to generate ultra-realistic voice audio — converting text to speech with emotion, cloning voices, selecting from 1000+ premade voices, and integrating high-quality TTS into agent workflows for narration, voice interfaces, and audio content generation.
use_cases: Generating high-quality voice narration from content creation agents
Adding speech output to conversational agents for voice interfaces
Cloning and reusing specific voices for consistent brand audio agents
Creating multilingual audio content from localization agents
Generating podcast or video narration from production agents
Building voice-enabled agent workflows with natural-sounding synthesis
not_for: Teams using Google TTS, AWS Polly, or Azure Speech as primary TTS
Real-time voice streaming in phone systems (use Twilio + TTS instead)
best_when: An agent needs the highest quality, most natural-sounding text-to-speech — especially with voice cloning or emotional nuance.
avoid_when: You need speech-to-text, real-time phone voice, or low-cost bulk TTS (cheaper options exist).

auth.notes: ElevenLabs API key from dashboard. Single key for all endpoints. No scopes or OAuth. Key has full account access including character quota.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter: $5/month (30K chars); Creator: $22 (100K chars); Pro: $99 (500K chars); Scale: $330 (2M chars); Enterprise: custom
pricing.notes: Character-based pricing. Voice cloning requires Creator plan or higher. Commercial use license needed for paid plans. MCP server is community open source.

performance.rate_limits: Concurrency limits by plan; free tier most restrictive

known_agent_gotchas: Character quota consumed per generation — agents must track quota to avoid overage
Voice ID required for generation — agents must list or hardcode specific voice IDs
Audio output format choices affect file size vs quality — mp3_44100_128 is common
Voice cloning requires audio sample upload — not available on free tier
Community MCP server — coverage may be limited to basic TTS endpoints
Streaming audio requires handling chunked responses — not all environments support this
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Single API key — full account access. GDPR. Community MCP server. Beware of quota exhaustion from agent loops. Commercial use requires paid plan.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Single API key — full account access, no scopes. GDPR. Community MCP server. Monitor character quota in agent loops.
